div.p: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

tr.td:
Malaria dose 1: Provision of the malaria dose 1 Trigger event: Child's birth Trigger pseudo: Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: WHO recommends that the first dose of vaccine be administered from 5 months of age.
If:
Applicability:
Malaria dose 1
(Malaria dose 1)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Malaria dose 1 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

Malaria dose 2: Provision of the malaria dose 2 Trigger event: First malaria dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Malaria vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1 Trigger date: "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Malaria vaccines") Create condition: There should be a minimum interval of 4 weeks between doses.
If:
Applicability:
Malaria dose 2
(Malaria dose 2)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Malaria dose 2 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

Malaria dose 3: Provision of the malaria dose 3 Trigger event: Second malaria dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Malaria vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 2 Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Malaria vaccines") Create condition: There should be a minimum interval of 4 weeks between doses.
If:
Applicability:
Malaria dose 3
(Malaria dose 3)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Malaria dose 3 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

Malaria dose 4: Provision of the malaria dose 4 Trigger event: Third malaria dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Malaria vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 3 Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Malaria vaccines") Create condition: There should be a minimum interval of 4 weeks between doses. The fourth dose should be provided approximately 12–18 months after the third dose to prolong the duration of protection.
If:
Applicability:
Malaria dose 4
(Malaria dose 4)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Malaria dose 4 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

valueString.value: Doses Administered to Patient
/** * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Doses Administered to Patient": [Immunization] I where I.status = 'completed' and I.isSubpotent is not true
Doses Administered to Patient
/** * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Doses Administered to Patient": Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
Malaria Doses Administered to Patient

/* @internal: Malaria containing Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Malaria Doses Administered to Patient": Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Malaria vaccines"
Malaria Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Malaria Primary Series Doses Administered
One malaria primary series dose was administered
First malaria dose from the primary series was administered
Two malaria primary series doses were administered
Second malaria dose from the primary series was administered
Malaria dose 2
Three malaria primary series doses were administered
Third malaria dose from the primary series was administered
Malaria dose 3
Date of Latest Malaria Dose
Malaria dose 3 Due Date
Malaria dose 3 Create
Four malaria primary series doses were administered
Fourth malaria dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
Malaria dose 4
Malaria dose 4 Due Date
Malaria dose 4 Overdue
Malaria dose 4 Create
No malaria primary series doses were administered
Malaria dose 1
Malaria dose 2 Due Date
Malaria dose 2 Create
Malaria dose 1 Due Date
Malaria dose 1 Create

/** * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series */ define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>): immunizations I where exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
define function ToString(value string): value.value
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept): if concept is null then null else System.Concept { codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C), display: concept.text.value }

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding): if coding is null then null else System.Code { code: coding.code.value, system: coding.system.value, version: coding.version.value, display: coding.display.value }
define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>): Last( immunizations I sort by start of occurrence.toInterval() )
define function ToDate(value date): value.value

citation.value: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

description.value: Provision of the malaria dose 1 Trigger event: Child's birth Trigger pseudo: Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: WHO recommends that the first dose of vaccine be administered from 5 months of age.

Provision of the malaria dose 2 Trigger event: First malaria dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Malaria vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1 Trigger date: "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Malaria vaccines") Create condition: There should be a minimum interval of 4 weeks between doses.

Provision of the malaria dose 3 Trigger event: Second malaria dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Malaria vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 2 Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Malaria vaccines") Create condition: There should be a minimum interval of 4 weeks between doses.

Provision of the malaria dose 4 Trigger event: Third malaria dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Malaria vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 3 Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Malaria vaccines") Create condition: There should be a minimum interval of 4 weeks between doses. The fourth dose should be provided approximately 12–18 months after the third dose to prolong the duration of protection.
